profile.name: Carter Lim
highlights: Founder/engineer of VocaView, an AI language-learning SaaS with subscriptions and usage-based credits
Built Stripe + Firebase payment and workflow automations
Improved Campus Compass recommendation accuracy from ~65% to ~90% using similarity modeling
Built Python data pipelines for club-profile vectorization and matching
Designed inventory automation at Sharetea reducing manual entry/errors by ~50%
